prompt: Write a complete Spring Boot REST controller class 'UserController' with: 1) A GET endpoint '/api/users' that returns a list of users, 2) A GET endpoint '/api/users/{id}' that returns a single user by ID, 3) A POST endpoint '/api/users' that creates a new user. Use @RestController annotation. Include a simple User record with 'id', 'name', and 'email' fields.
